cause_analysis.narrative: Peace Love and Hair Salon churned on 2026-04-13 after 364 days with Zoca. Classification: reactive fade — Zoca reached out 56 times, but the client only replied 13. A one-sided monologue in the weeks before churn.
recommendations: [Engagement] One-way outreach is a warning, not a save. Cap outreach at 5 attempts if no reply, then switch to a different channel or a different messenger (SP → AM → team lead) to break the pattern.

Hey Alicia, I hope you're doing well! I wanted to reach out and introduce myself – I'm Kanak, and I'll be working with you moving forward. Asmita has moved to another team, so I'm stepping in to support your account. I'm really looking forward to getting to know you and your business.

I'd also love to connect with you for a quick chat whenever you have some time. It would be really helpful to hear how things are going with your business and what's working well for you, so I can make sure I'm helping you in the best way possible.

When you have a moment, please choose a time that works for you from my Calendly link: https://calendly.com/kanak-s-zoca/zoca-call?utm_term=62146&utm_content=3696.  I'm looking forward to connecting and supporting your success!
